summary: Excellent matrix recording captures a high‑energy spring ’81 European show, highlighted by Let It Grow > China Cat Sunflower > The Other One and soaring Eyes of the World.
review: All six reviewers rave about this matrix mix, calling it an improvement over the soundboard with perfect balance and just enough audience ambience to add depth. The performance is described as upbeat, tight and full of standout moments – especially Althea, Let It Grow > China Cat Sunflower > The Other One, Eyes of the World and a stellar second‑set flow.

ai_rating.rationale: Uniform 5‑star ratings and detailed praise for both the musical performance and the matrix recording indicate an exceptional show with excellent sound quality.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers note the audience (AUD) layer adds depth, the mix is perfect, crisp, and makes listeners feel “right there” – no complaints about drop‑outs or muddiness.

standout_songs: Let It Grow > China Cat Sunflower > The Other One
show_quality.setlist_flow: Up‑beat, tight first set that builds into an interesting second set starting with Jack Straw and flowing through Ship of Fools into a powerful Estimated Prophet > Eyes of the World sequence; overall pacing praised as well‑played and energetic.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Multiple reviewers praise Jerry’s guitar tone, weaving web‑like solos and majestic phrasing throughout the show.
